title: Curaleaf Holdings Inc (CURLF) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Curaleaf reported Q3 2024 revenue of $331 million with adjusted gross margins reaching 49%, representing a 310 basis point increase annually. However, total revenue declined 1% year-over-year, and the company posted a net loss from continuing operations of $44 million. The international segment demonstrated robust expansion, with international segment showing significant growth, increasing 82% year-over-year and achieving 17% quarter-over-quarter gains. The company generated $42 million in operating cash flow and $14 million in free cash flow from continuing operations. The cannabis sector faced persistent headwinds, including national trends showing an 11% decline in pricing during the third quarter. Specific markets struggled—Arizona experienced a 20% sales decline, while Florida's market faced obstacles following Amendment 3's failure. Executive leadership indicated that pricing pressures vary by market and may be transitory in some regions. The company maintains focus on operational efficiencies in the U.S. while pursuing expansion opportunities in Europe, particularly through organic growth initiatives rather than aggressive acquisition strategies.
